title: Lonely
why_this_song: Lonely by Justin Bieber (2020) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

We sittin' in the mirror, tryna steady yourself

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lonely" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lonely" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "maybe" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "maybe" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But maybe that's the price you pay

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But somethin' 'bout it still feels strange

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Lonely", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Lonely", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Lonely" was released in 2020. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Lonely" foi lançada em 2020. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Justin Bieber one question about "Lonely", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Justin Bieber sobre "Lonely", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Lonely" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Lonely" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
